requirement.title: Bulk Review For LLM Suggestions
requirement.goal: Cho phep user review hang loat LLM suggestions theo filter de approve hoac reject nhieu suggestion cung luc, trong khi van reuse durable `LlmSuggestion` rows va materialization semantics da duoc FE-15 xac lap.
rationale: FE-15 da co durable `LlmSuggestion` rows va single-review API, nhung review tung cai mot se cham khi suite co nhieu suggestion cung loai.
FE-16 da mo rong cung lifecycle nay voi feedback metadata, nen FE-17 can giu cung aggregate va khong duoc tao luong bulk rieng ben ngoai `TestGeneration`.
Bulk approve/reject nen reuse chinh transaction/materialization pattern cua FE-15 de tranh drift giua single review va batch review.
Vi FE-17 la application-flow feature, giai phap tot nhat la them CQRS + controller surface tren storage hien co thay vi tao them bang hoac cache state moi.

inScope: Them API bulk review cho `LlmSuggestion` theo `TestSuiteId` va optional filters.
Bulk approve phai materialize thanh `TestCase` graph theo cung pattern FE-15.
Bulk reject chi cap nhat review metadata, khong tao `TestCase` moi.
Reuse shared review service cho single review va bulk review.
Them result model tong hop so luong matched/processed/materialized va danh sach ids.
Them targeted unit tests cho batch filter semantics, approve/reject behavior, va verification gates.
outOfScope: Bulk modify-and-approve voi noi dung sua rieng cho tung suggestion.
Bulk feedback submission cho `LlmSuggestionFeedback` (de lai cho feature khac neu can).
Tao module moi, queue moi, worker moi, hay runtime dependency moi.
Thay doi schema `LlmSuggestion` hoac tao batch aggregate table moi, tru khi codebase co blocker that su.
UI implementation; package nay chi dinh nghia backend contracts va implementation direction.

requiredFeatures.reason: Can durable `LlmSuggestion`, single-review semantics, va materialization workflow lam nen tang cho FE-17.
Can giu compatibility voi current-user feedback va feedback summary tren suggestion reads.
Suggestions duoc tao tu existing LLM pipeline va van la source dau vao cho FE-15/FE-17 review workflows.
Materialization van dua tren approved API order gate.
Can `TestCase` graph builders/materializer conventions khi bulk approve tao test cases.
Bulk approve van phai ton trong `MaxTestCasesPerSuite` usage pattern.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestGeneration
requiredModules.role: Primary module cho durable suggestions, review lifecycle, va test-case materialization.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.LlmAssistant
requiredModules.role: Indirect support module cho raw suggestion cache/audit da duoc FE-06 va FE-15 su dung; FE-17 khong them durable batch state vao day.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.Subscription
requiredModules.role: Check va increment `MaxTestCasesPerSuite` trong bulk approve.

database.reason: FE-17 preferred design reuse `LlmSuggestion` va `LlmSuggestionFeedback` da ton tai; feature nay la batch workflow tren existing durable state.

architectureDecisions.executionMode: Synchronous request-response with transactional materialization for bulk approve and transactional metadata updates for bulk reject.

reviewStorage.selectionRule: Chi review batch tren suggestion rows thuoc mot `TestSuiteId`, dang `Pending`, va match optional filters.
reviewStorage.historyRule: Khong tao batch aggregate entity moi; lich su van nam tren tung suggestion row thong qua `ReviewStatus`, `ReviewedById`, `ReviewedAt`, `ReviewNotes`, va `AppliedTestCaseId`.

designPrinciples: FE-17 phai reuse shared review/materialization logic thay vi duplicate logic approve/reject trong bulk command handler.
Bulk endpoint khong duoc dispatch lai tung single-review command trong loop; phai xu ly nhu mot batch workflow.
Filter semantics phai batch-load durable suggestions mot lan va order theo `DisplayOrder` de ket qua on dinh.
FE-17 phai additive, khong duoc pha FE-15 single review hoac FE-16 feedback read/write surface.
Khong them migration hoac Docker wiring neu implementation chi la CQRS/controller/service.

notes: Bulk review la write action tren suite-owned data, nen tiep tuc reuse `Permission:UpdateTestCase`.

gracefulDegradation: Neu khong co suggestion nao match filters, API tra ket qua hop le voi counts = 0 va khong co side effect.
Bulk approve phai all-or-nothing trong transaction cho write set materialization.
Bulk reject khong duoc tao `TestCase` hay `TestSuiteVersion` moi.

acceptanceCriteria: AC-01: POST `/api/test-suites/{suiteId:guid}/llm-suggestions/bulk-review` voi `action=Approve` approve tat ca suggestions dang `Pending` match bo filter va materialize thanh `TestCase` rows.
AC-02: POST cung endpoint voi `action=Reject` reject tat ca suggestions dang `Pending` match bo filter va khong tao `TestCase` moi.
AC-03: Chi owner cua suite moi duoc bulk review suggestions cua suite do.
AC-04: API chi chap nhan `Approve` hoac `Reject`; action khac bi tu choi bang validation error co kiem soat.
AC-05: `ReviewNotes` la bat buoc khi bulk reject.
AC-06: Filter semantics ho tro `FilterBySuggestionType`, `FilterByTestType`, va `FilterByEndpointId`.
AC-07: Suggestions khong o trang thai `Pending` khong duoc xu ly trong batch.
AC-08: Neu khong co suggestion nao match, API van tra 200 voi counts = 0 va khong co side effect.
AC-09: Bulk approve phai reuse FE-15 materialization logic, ghi `TestCaseChangeLog`, va tang `TestSuiteVersion` theo cung pattern.
AC-10: Bulk approve phai check/increment `MaxTestCasesPerSuite` mot lan cho ca batch.
AC-11: FE-17 khong yeu cau migration moi hay Docker wiring moi theo preferred solution, nhung ket luan nay van phai duoc verify va report theo `AGENTS.md`.
implementationOrder: 1. Reuse or harden shared review service cho ca single review va bulk review.
2. Them bulk command/request/result/controller wiring voi filter semantics.
3. Them targeted tests va chay build/test verification.
